personal.name: Aditya Rathod
personal.title: Systems • Backend • AI Tooling • Computer Vision
personal.education: B.Tech in Electrical Engineering, IIT Jodhpur (2024–2028), CGPA: 7.38/10

hero.name: Aditya Rathod
hero.title: Systems • Backend • AI Tooling • Computer Vision
hero.description: Building infrastructure platforms, static analysis engines, and real-time vision systems with production-grade engineering, comprehensive testing, and clean architecture.

text: Third-year Electrical Engineering student at IIT Jodhpur building infrastructure platforms, static analysis engines, and real-time computer vision systems.
I work across backend engineering, systems programming, and applied ML — from 180+ endpoint API platforms with 1,900+ tests to Rust-based static analysis with Tree-sitter and 14-language parsing.
highlights: Built CORTEX, a local-first AI infrastructure platform with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Qdrant, agent execution loops, and 1,900+ automated tests.
Built ASTERA, a production-grade static analysis engine in Rust with Tree-sitter parsers for 14 languages, 153 tests, and 92 Criterion benchmarks.
Shipped computer vision systems on Jetson Orin NX (YOLO at 10–14 FPS onboard), ESP32-CAM face recognition, and CNN-Attention research under Prof. Pratik Mazumder.
Focused on backend engineering, infrastructure, and systems roles requiring APIs, databases, concurrency, testing, and reproducible evaluation.

exploringTopics.title: Backend & Infrastructure
exploringTopics.description: FastAPI platforms, agent systems, JWT/CSRF auth, Redis queues, vector search, and production-grade API architecture.

exploringTopics.title: Static Analysis & Code Intelligence
exploringTopics.description: Tree-sitter parsing, Code Property Graphs, symbol resolution, dependency traversal, and semantic search in Rust.

exploringTopics.title: Computer Vision & Embedded AI
exploringTopics.description: Real-time YOLO inference on Jetson, TinyML on ESP32-CAM, and hybrid CNN-Attention architectures for imbalanced image classification.

exploringTopics.title: Systems & Concurrency
exploringTopics.description: Multithreaded blockchain validation, P2P networking, async Rust with Tokio/Rayon, and concurrent systems design.

experience.description: Researching imbalanced image classification under Prof. Pratik Mazumder using hybrid CNN-Attention architectures for robust classification of natural image datasets.
highlights: Designed experiments to measure robustness across class imbalance, disease categories, and real-world image variation
Reproduced PLDNet as a controlled baseline; fixed dataset splits, training configuration, evaluation scripts, and comparison protocol
Evaluated 30+ model variants with ablations on attention placement, feature fusion, and representation changes
Benchmarked Mendeley Potato Leaf Disease (3,076 images, 7 classes) and curated PlantVillage data (2,152 images, 3 classes)
Prepared reporting pipeline for accuracy, F1 score, per-class recall, confusion matrices, and PLDNet-relative comparisons

experience.company: DevLup Labs — plink Summer of Code
experience.description: Contributed to plink, a peer-to-peer file transfer platform, across networking, secure transfer flows, reliability, and product polish.
highlights: Contributed networking modules for direct connections, UPnP/NAT traversal, role reversal, and heterogeneous client networks
Implemented TCP socket paths for encrypted file chunks, metadata exchange, multithreaded transfer coordination, and port-scanning utilities
Completed 16 assigned tasks across cryptography, networking, file metadata, chunk handling, parsing, and documentation

projects.title: CORTEX
projects.description: Local-first AI infrastructure for developer intelligence with 180+ endpoints across 10 routers.
projects.longDescription: Designed a local-first AI infrastructure platform using FastAPI, Next.js 15, React 19, PostgreSQL, Redis, embedded Qdrant, arq workers, JWT/CSRF auth, Argon2, Fernet/PBKDF2 encryption. Organized backend into 106 services, 44 models, 45 schemas, and 37 migrations. Implemented agent execution loop with tool dispatch, stall detection, context compaction, token accounting, and hybrid retrieval over episodic, semantic, and working memory. Validated with 1,900+ automated tests.

projects.title: ASTERA
projects.description: Production-grade static analysis and code intelligence engine in Rust.
projects.longDescription: Built a local-first static-analysis engine that parses repositories into a queryable Code Property Graph for symbol lookup, semantic search, dependency traversal, impact analysis, metrics, and architecture checks. Implemented a 12-crate Rust workspace with Tree-sitter parsers for 14 languages, Axum REST APIs, WebSocket events, plugin hooks, SQLite FTS5 indexing, CLI commands, and incremental file watching. Covered with 153 automated tests and 92 Criterion benchmarks.

projects.title: Jetson-Enabled UAV Systems Integration
projects.description: Companion-computer architecture for MAVLink control, telemetry, and onboard perception.
projects.longDescription: Integrated an NVIDIA Jetson companion computer with a Cube Orange flight controller over MAVLink for command exchange, telemetry streaming, and onboard perception. Assembled and flight-tested a quadcopter platform under Dr. Hardik Jain, validating ~20 minutes of endurance on a 3S LiPo battery. Deployed YOLO-based object detection at ~10–14 FPS onboard inference during flight tests.

projects.title: Parallel Blockchain Simulator
projects.description: Concurrent blockchain simulation with thread-safe validation and 7 parallel threads.
projects.longDescription: Coordinated 7 blockchain threads — 3 miners, 3 validators, and 1 transaction generator — using mutex locks and events around shared chain state. Modeled account balances, linked-list blocks, queued transactions, hash-map mempool lookup, Merkle verification, and SHA-256 Proof-of-Work at difficulty 3. Stress-tested under randomized loads, processing 131–200 validated transactions per simulation.

projects.title: Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
projects.description: PPO-based traffic-signal optimizer trained in a custom Gymnasium simulation environment.
projects.longDescription: Trained PPO traffic-signal policies for 500,000+ timesteps using 16 vectorized Gymnasium environments and TensorBoard diagnostics. Defined state and reward features for vehicle density, waiting time, stochastic arrivals, congestion penalties, and throughput. Measured policy improvement with 2341.5 final test reward and 2371.47 mean evaluation reward.

projects.title: Edge AI Face Recognition System
projects.description: Offline face recognition on ESP32-CAM with on-device TinyML inference.
projects.longDescription: Deployed offline face recognition on ESP32-CAM with Edge Impulse, achieving ~90% internal evaluation accuracy through on-device inference. Collected a custom dataset of ~100–150 images across 5 individuals. Completed the TinyML workflow from data collection and labeling to model training, Arduino IDE deployment, and embedded inference.

projects.title: Autonomous Wall-Following Robot
projects.description: PID-controlled differential-drive robot with ultrasonic sensor feedback.
projects.longDescription: Programmed autonomous wall-following navigation on Arduino Uno/Nano using 3 HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensors and an L298N differential-drive motor driver. Implemented PID control with integral windup protection, output limiting, dynamic derivative calculation, turn reset logic, and serial diagnostics for tuning.

projects.title: Game Centre
projects.description: Console-based multi-game platform with user authentication in C.
projects.longDescription: Led a 5-member team building a menu-driven C gaming platform with 3 classic games and shared module interfaces. Implemented Minesweeper, authentication, login validation, persistent sessions, saved state, and structured file I/O. Managed the central GitHub repository, resolved merge conflicts, and coordinated module integration.

research.title: Hybrid CNN-Attention Architectures for Robust Classification of Imbalanced Natural Image Datasets
research.description: Researching imbalanced image classification under Prof. Pratik Mazumder using hybrid CNN-Attention architectures with reproducible evaluation.
highlights: Reproduced PLDNet as a controlled baseline and fixed evaluation protocol
Evaluated 30+ model variants with ablations on attention placement and feature fusion
Benchmarked Mendeley Potato Leaf Disease (3,076 images, 7 classes) and PlantVillage data (2,152 images, 3 classes)
Prepared pipeline for accuracy, F1 score, per-class recall, and confusion matrices

leadership.organization: Designerds — The Design Club, IIT Jodhpur
highlights: Guided 50+ students, ran design workshops, and helped secure 7th rank at Inter IIT Cultural Meet 8.0
Coordinated design competitions and club events throughout the academic year
Supported 12 first-year students through academic transition and campus onboarding

leadership.organization: Inside — The Game Development Society, IIT Jodhpur
highlights: Coached 5 first-year students on an Inside-backed game-building project
Led 30+ volunteers and managed digital design for Ignus '26
Led 30+ volunteers and managed digital design for Prometeo '26
Led 30+ volunteers and managed digital design for Varchas '25

achievements: JEE Main 2024 — All India Rank 7,932 out of 1,415,110 candidates
JEE Advanced 2024 — All India Rank 8,663 out of 180,200 candidates
